violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. PIC provided proof of successful completion of Food Safety Course. PIC is to be registered as the Certified Food Safety Manager for the location. Food Safety Manager Application supplied to PIC at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The double door exit to the outside adjacent to the kitchen area was observed to have a gap at the base where the doors meet. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (Porous tile). Ceilings shall be designed, constructed, and installed so they are SMOOTH and EASILY CLEANABLE. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served as required. Per the PIC, currently enrolled in a food safety course. (Since previous inspection, employee has been registered for food safety course and exam.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Per the PIC, currently enrolled in a food safety course. Upon successful completion of the course, PIC is to be registered as the Certified Food Safety Manager for the location. (Certified Food Safety Manager License application to be submitted upon successful completion of the registered Food Safety Course and Exam.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (Porous tile). Ceilings shall be designed, constructed, and installed so they are SMOOTH and EASILY CLEANABLE. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served as required. Per the PIC, currently enrolled in a food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Per the PIC, currently enrolled in a food safety course. Upon successful completion of the course, PIC is to be registered as the Certified Food Safety Manager for the location. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Several food items throughout the 2 Door Reach-In Cooler were observed held at 49-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food items were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

At the time of inspection, the 2 Door Reach-In Cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 52 degrees Fahrenheit with food observed held at 49 to 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Use of the unit for cold holding of Time/Temperature Control for Safety (TCS) Foods is to be discontinued until adjusted, repaired, or replaced and observed to be properly maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below for proper cold holding of TCS Foods. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (Porous tile). Ceilings shall be designed, constructed, and installed so they are SMOOTH and EASILY CLEANABLE. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

At the time of inspection, the Certified Food Safety Manager License registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection was observed to be EXPIRED and registered with a different location (215 Columbia St., Wakefield). CFSM License is to be renewed, and Location address is to be changed/updated to 310 Matunuck Beach Rd., South Kingstown. CFSM Address Change Form printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (Porous tile). Ceilings shall be designed, constructed, and installed so they are SMOOTH and EASILY CLEANABLE. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

At the time of inspection, the Certified Food Safety Manager License registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection was observed to be EXPIRED and registered with a different location (215 Columbia St., Wakefield). CFSM License is to be renewed, and Location address is to be changed/updated to 310 Matunuck Beach Rd., South Kingstown. CFSM Address Change Form printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Several food items stored in the 2 Door Reach-In Cooler were observed held at 47 to 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of by employee at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

At the time of inspection, the 2 Door Reach-In Cooler was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 51 to 57 degrees Fahrenheit with food items observed at 47 to 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Use of the 2 Door Reach-In Cooler unit for storage of Time/Temperature for Safety Foods is to be discontinued until unit is serviced/repaired and maintaining proper ambient temperature for cold holding (41 degrees Fahrenheit or below). New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (Porous tile). Ceilings shall be designed, constructed, and installed so they are SMOOTH and EASILY CLEANABLE. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (Porous tile). Ceilings shall be designed, constructed, and installed so they are SMOOTH and EASILY CLEANABLE. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
